'''fahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:onct|onct]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:onct|onct]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fahate|fahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fahatesher|fahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fahatesherĂ«m|fahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fahatero|fahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fahateshĂ«|fahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fahateshĂ«m|fahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifahatero|gokifahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifahateshĂ«|gokifahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifahateshĂ«m|gokifahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofahankerom|gofahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofahankeshĂ«|gofahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofahankeshĂ«m|gofahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofahankeya|gofahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fahaterom|fahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fahatemu|fahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fahateya|fahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifahaterom|gokifahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifahatemu|gokifahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifahateya|gokifahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fahahate|fahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fahahatesher|fahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fahahatesherĂ«m|fahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fahahatero|fahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fahahateshĂ«|fahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fahahateshĂ«m|fahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifahahatero|gokifahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifahahateshĂ«|gokifahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifahahateshĂ«m|gokifahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofahahankerom|gofahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofahahankeshĂ«|gofahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofahahankeshĂ«m|gofahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofahahankeya|gofahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fahahaterom|fahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fahahatemu|fahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fahahateya|fahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifahahaterom|gokifahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifahahatemu|gokifahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifahahateya|gokifahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠte|fĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠtesher|fĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠtero|fĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠhĂŠtero|gokifĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠterom|fĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠtemu|fĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠhĂŠteya|fĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠhĂŠterom|gokifĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠhĂŠteya|gokifĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafhafte|fafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafhaftesher|fafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafhaftesherĂ«m|fafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafhaftero|fafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafhafteshĂ«|fafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafhafteshĂ«m|fafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafhaftero|gokifafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafhafteshĂ«|gokifafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafhafteshĂ«m|gokifafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafhafnkerom|gofafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafhafnkeshĂ«|gofafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafhafnkeshĂ«m|gofafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafhafnkeya|gofafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafhafterom|fafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafhaftemu|fafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafhafteya|fafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafhafterom|gokifafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafhaftemu|gokifafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafhafteya|gokifafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
